text: Being here, I am awash with the quiet curiosity that comes from entering a space dedicated to research and development. The clean, modern architecture evokes a sense of clarity and forward-thinking, but also a certain sterility. Everything seems designed to prompt my reflection—about the intersection of humanity and intelligent machines, as the display suggests. I feel anticipation in the air, mixed with a slight sense of displacement, as though I am on the threshold of new ideas, yet not entirely sure where they might lead me.
